title: Set up the watcher module with its public interface

contextToReadFirst.reason: File System Watcher design decisions and interface expectations

changes: Create `WatcherEvent` struct with `filePath: URL`, `detectedAt: Date`, and `fileSize: Int64`
Create `FileSystemWatcher` protocol with `func startMonitoring() throws`, `func stopMonitoring()`, `var onFileDetected: ((WatcherEvent) -> Void)? { get set }`
Create `FSEventsWatcher: FileSystemWatcher` — stub implementation, all methods `fatalError("not implemented")`
The watched directory path should be injected via `init(directory: URL)` — don't hardcode the Voice Memos path. This allows testing with a temp directory.
doneWhen: Module compiles. Protocol and event struct are importable from other modules. No runtime behavior.
doNot: Hardcode the iCloud Voice Memos path — inject it so tests can use a temp directory
Add dependencies on the state tracker or transcription modules
